title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop (Mac and Windows) and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. It organizes data, schedules recurring tasks, and orchestrates complex workflows through connectors to services like Gmail and Google Calendar. The feature is available in Claude Pro and Max subscription plans.
